pattern: Tracking both the maximum and minimum running products at each index handles sign flips from negative numbers in linear time.
hints: A negative number can turn the smallest product into the largest, so the minimum so far matters as much as the maximum.
At each element, the best product ending here is that element alone, or it times the previous best, or it times the previous worst.
Carry forward both a running max and a running min; when the current value is negative the two effectively swap, and answer is the largest max ever seen.

edge_inputs.description: zero breaks the subarray, single negative best
two negatives multiply to a positive max
odd count of negatives, must drop one end

stress.description: large array over the small value range with zeros and negatives
stress.note: the answer is guaranteed to fit in 32-bit by the small range and modest length
